productDisplayName: Red Tape Brown Casual Men's Shoe
description: Stylish and uber cool, these semi-formal boots with a pointed toe design from red tape add an extra bounce to your step. With a high quality leather upper and no laces, they are easy to wear and take off. They look great with jeans, chinos or even your formal trousers. Easy to look spectacular, classy and wow!
